parsed.reason: This note is warm, calm, and plain-spoken. It's concise—not a wall of text. Every claim is directly supported by the supplied data: Mira's 18-month vaccines due in 2 weeks (✓), mention of two-word phrases as a developmental milestone (✓), Theo's hopping on one foot milestone (✓), and the Saturday community pool drop-in swim activity (✓). No invented events, appointments, children, or unsupported developmental claims. The tone is reassuring and parent-friendly.
